title: Add CLI arguments to rkv_sharded_dispatch.py dispatcher

requirements: Add 2 CLI arguments to ArgumentParser in rkv_sharded_dispatch.py: --sparse-use-similarity (bool flag), --sparse-similarity-mix-lambda (float)
Forward 2 parameters to runner_args list when launching runner processes
acceptance: 2 CLI arguments added: verify by grep 'sparse-use-similarity\|sparse-similarity-mix-lambda' R-KV/weian_development/rkv_sharded_dispatch.py | wc -l >= 2
Arguments forwarded to runner: verify by grep 'sparse.use.similarity\|sparse.similarity.mix.lambda' R-KV/weian_development/rkv_sharded_dispatch.py in runner command construction
Pattern consistency: implementation matches existing --sparse-normalize-scores forwarding pattern

context: Dispatcher needs to forward these arguments to runner instances

conventions: Use conditional argument building for optional parameters
Maintain None default for override-only arguments

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths and smart context
Study how --sparse-normalize-scores is implemented in dispatch script
Find where runner command arguments are assembled for subprocess launch

implementation_approach.title: Add --sparse-use-similarity CLI argument to dispatcher
implementation_approach.description: Add boolean flag argument following sparse-normalize-scores pattern
modification_points: Add parser.add_argument('--sparse-use-similarity', dest='sparse_use_similarity', action='store_true', help='Override runner arg: enable Similarity Deduplication in SpecKV') to argument parser
Add parser.add_argument('--no-sparse-use-similarity', dest='sparse_use_similarity', action='store_false', help='Override runner arg: disable Similarity Deduplication in SpecKV')
logic_flow: Follow same pattern: positive flag, negative flag, set_defaults(None)
Use None default to distinguish between user-specified and config-specified

implementation_approach.title: Add --sparse-similarity-mix-lambda CLI argument to dispatcher
implementation_approach.description: Add float argument for mix_lambda parameter override
modification_points: Add parser.add_argument('--sparse-similarity-mix-lambda', type=float, default=None, help='Override runner arg: frequency score weight for similarity scoring') to argument parser
logic_flow: Set default=None to allow config-specified default (0.1) when not overridden
Document as override parameter in help text

implementation_approach.title: Forward arguments to runner command
implementation_approach.description: Build runner arguments list with conditional inclusion of new parameters
modification_points: Add conditional block for sparse_use_similarity: if args.sparse_use_similarity is not None, append '--sparse-use-similarity' or omit flag to runner_args

Add conditional block for sparse_similarity_mix_lambda: if args.sparse_similarity_mix_lambda is not None, append ['--sparse-similarity-mix-lambda', str(args.sparse_similarity_mix_lambda)] to runner_args
logic_flow: Locate runner command construction section where runner_args are assembled
Find where sparse_normalize_scores is conditionally forwarded
For boolean: only append flag when True (action='store_true' style)
For float: append key-value pair when not None
Maintain same conditional logic pattern as sparse_normalize_scores
